prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UT22KGMS-3625L-BLCK Product Type: ART_SUPPLIES Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 22k Gold Marking Stamp for Jewelry Metalworking Arts and Crafts Description: The bent style of this stamp is designed to easily mark the inside of a ring, making it easy to mark just about any type of jewelry. It can easily be used with your own tools by simply securing the jewelry and hitting the broad end of the stamp with a mallet.

Constructed of durable stainless steel, this marking stamp will stand the test of time. Make sure to grab one before your next jewelry making or metalworking project. Search Terms: jewelers tools purity mark karat gold silver stamp DIY ring necklace jewelry marking crafting tool stamps Features: - Material: Stainless Steel - Mark Designation: 22k Gold - Length: 3.625" L - Bent Style for Easy Use - Authenticate Your Jewelry === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 22k Gold Marking Stamp for Jewelry

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 3.625 in Gold Marking Stamp

anthropic.title_differentiation: Bent Style Design, Stainless Steel Construction, Purity Mark, Ring Interior Marking, Metalworking Arts And Crafts

openai.title_differentiation: 22K Gold Mark, Bent Style For Ring Interiors, Stainless Steel, Durable, Jewelry And Metalworking
